title: Time Series Analysis of Production in Indian Textiles Sector

summary.about: Whether standard production relationships hold in India’s textile industry over time.
summary.audience: Textile economists, manufacturers and industrial policymakers.
summary.method: Uses time-series cointegration and shock-response analysis for output, capital, labor and productivity.
summary.insights: Capital and output move together long term, while employment and capital shocks can reduce output or future productivity.
